item.name: Aeturna Horn
item.description: Wrought of bone, this horn emits a vigorous sound that summons the aeturna to your side.

mount.name: Aeturna
mount.action: Summon forth the aeturna, an imposing feline that boasts far more than the standard nine lives.
mount.description: During an expedition to Ilsabard in his younger years, Emperor Xande is said to have come upon this fearsome beast. As its name, meaning “eternal,” would suggest, it possesses remarkable vitality, and in addition to serving as an armored warbeast, it was also a subject in the Allagans' research into immortality.
mount.tooltip:
Eternal life can be yours,
ladies and gentlemen!
- Silver-tongued Broker
